evals.prompt: I need CT log search for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-transparency skill for this certificate transparency request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects certificate-transparency for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_search_ct.
Keeps the response focused on searching Certificate Transparency (CT) logs for certificates associated with a domain.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate transparency workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-transparency skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-transparency instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
